title: Senior API Engineer (React, AEM, Cloud, DevOps & AI)
company_focus: Digital solutions and experience engineering for enterprises
description:
• Strong hands on experience with Node.js for scalable
backend systems • Advanced CI/CD and DevOps practices • Deep
experience with Kafka for designing event driven
architectures • Strong data modeling and optimization skills
using PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, and MongoDB • Solid experience
with AWS services and cloud architecture • Expertise in AWS
Lambda and serverless design patterns • API design,
performance tuning, and system reliability • Production
support, root cause analysis, and escalation handling • Code
reviews, mentoring, and technical leadership


Responsibilities

• Design, build, and own scalable backend systems using
Node.js. • Architect and optimize event driven systems using
Kafka. • Design efficient data models and access patterns
using PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, and MongoDB. • Design and
implement serverless solutions using AWS Lambda. • Drive AWS
architecture decisions, performance optimization, and
reliability improvements. • Lead API design, code reviews,
and backend best practices. • Perform root cause analysis,
handle production escalations, and drive resolutions. •
Mentor engineers and provide technical guidance. • Working
knowledge of React and Next.js is optional.

Qualifications

BE

About UsAt Zensar, we’re “experience-led everything”. We are
committed to conceptualizing, designing, engineering,
marketing, and managing digital solutions and experiences
for over 130 leading enterprises. We are a company driven by
a bold purpose: Together, we shape experiences for better
futures. Whether for our clients, our people, or the world
around us, this belief powers everything we do. At the heart
of our culture is ONE with Client - a set of four core
values that reflect who we are and how we work: One Zensar,
Nurturing, Empowering, and Client Focus. Part of the $4.8
billion RPG Group, we’re a community of 10,000+ innovators
across 30+ global locations, including Milpitas, Seattle,
Princeton, Cape Town, London, Zurich, Singapore, and Mexico
City. Explore Life at Zensar and join us to Grow. Own.
Achieve. Learn. to be the best version of yourself. We
believe the best work happens when individuality is
celebrated, growth is encouraged, and well-being is
prioritized. We are an equal employment opportunity (EEO)
and affirmative action employer, committed to creating an
inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will be
considered without regard to race, creed, color, ancestry,
religion, sex, national origin, citizenship, age, sexual
orientation, gender identity, disability, marital status,
family medical leave status, or protected veteran status.
responsibilities: Design, build, and own scalable backend systems using Node.js
Architect and optimize event-driven systems using Kafka
Design efficient data models and access patterns using PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, and MongoDB
Design and implement serverless solutions using AWS Lambda
Drive AWS architecture decisions, performance optimization, and reliability improvements
Lead API design, code reviews, and backend best practices
Perform root cause analysis, handle production escalations, and drive resolutions

ai_classification_reasoning:
Despite the job title mentioning "AI," the actual
responsibilities and qualifications focus entirely on
backend engineering with Node.js, Kafka, databases, AWS, and
DevOps. There is no mention of building, training, fine-
tuning, or deploying AI/ML models. The AI mention in the
title appears to be peripheral or a buzzword addition rather
than a core responsibility.
